fields.name: Support Text
fields.default: Have a different question and can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our support team by sending us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

default.question: What's the best thing about Switzerland?
default.answer: I don't know, but the flag is a big plus. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.

default.question: How do you make holy water?
default.answer: You boil the hell out of it. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.

default.question: Why do you never see elephants hiding in trees?
default.answer: Because they're so good at it. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.

default.question: What do you call someone with no body and no nose?
default.answer: Nobody knows. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.

default.question: Why can't you hear a pterodactyl go to the bathroom?
default.answer: Because the pee is silent. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.

default.question: Why did the invisible man turn down the job offer?
default.answer: He couldn't see himself doing it. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.
